reviews.comment:
El lavadero de autos es lo PEOR que he visto en ese rubro. Carisimo y lavan peor que los lavaderos de 300 pesos. No entiendo como el ACA puede tener un servicio asi que es practicamente un robo, sin olvidar men cionar lo mal que trabajan los empleados, que te ofrecen escobillas y si decis que no, casi ni te secan el auto.

(Translated by Google)
The car wash is the WORST I've ever seen. It's ridiculously expensive and the cleaning is worse than the 300-peso car washes. I don't understand how the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) can offer such a service; it's practically highway robbery. And let's not forget the terrible work of the employees—they offer you brushes, and if you say no, they barely even dry your car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdnYzQjh3RRAB
